name: hopper_bf16_gemm_long
title: Hopper BF16 GEMM Arena Long Run
description: Longer Hopper H100 BF16 GEMM arena intended for more stable adapter comparisons, better latency variance reads, and richer artifact collection across control, square, and transformer-style shapes.

shapes.name: control-square-512
shapes.note: Long control shape to expose orchestration tax and variance instead of hiding it behind only large GEMMs.

shapes.name: square-1024
shapes.note: Long medium square GEMM for a cleaner transition from launch-bound behavior into sustained compute.

shapes.name: square-2048
shapes.note: Long sustained square throughput checkpoint with more repetitions for ranking confidence.

shapes.name: square-4096
shapes.note: Primary long Hopper square throughput read for vendor and custom tensor-core lanes.

shapes.name: prefill-proj-8192x4096x4096
shapes.note: Long prefill-style projection to stress sustained feed and scheduling over a larger evidence window.

shapes.name: ff-up-4096x4096x16384
shapes.note: Long transformer MLP expansion GEMM to catch adapters that only look good on neat square shapes.

shapes.name: ff-down-4096x16384x4096
shapes.note: Long transformer MLP contraction GEMM to expose memory-feed and scheduling weaknesses over more samples.
